intro: The genuinely good stuff from DansDeals and Doctor of Credit - the plays worth your time, not the same five cards every site pushes. Bank bonuses, viral hacks, and only the card offers that are actually at all-time highs. I keep this tight and current.

items.name: Paze: up to $100 back + 10x points
items.detail: Up to $100 statement credit per card, plus 10x points at select merchants
items.meta: The one everyone's piling into — 1,000+ comments on DansDeals
items.why: Barely any effort. Add your cards to Paze, pay with it where it's accepted, credits are already posting. Do it before it dies.

items.name: Citi — up to $2,000
items.meta: NO direct deposit — just park a deposit ($100k–$250k tiers)
items.why: Biggest no-DD bonus going. If you've got cash sitting idle, this is free money for parking it.

items.name: Chase Checking + Savings — up to $900
items.meta: Direct deposit, no minimum — stack checking + savings
items.why: The easy one everyone should do. A direct deposit and a bit of patience for $900.

items.name: SoFi — ~$675
items.detail: $300 from SoFi + up to $375 via portal
items.why: Stack the SoFi bonus with a shopping-portal payout and you clear ~$675 for one direct deposit.

items.name: Four Leaf FCU — $550
items.meta: $500+ direct deposit · no credit-card funding · Chex-sensitive
items.why: High payout for a tiny $500 deposit. Watch your ChexSystems if you churn banks hard.

items.name: Percapita — $300 (no direct deposit)
items.meta: $300+ monthly spend · NO direct deposit required
items.why: One of the few real no-DD checking bonuses. Good if you can't spare a direct deposit.

items.name: Chase Ink Business Cash
items.meta: $8,000 spend in 3 months · best offer EVER
items.why: No annual fee and the highest bonus this card has ever had. A side hustle counts as the 'business'.

items.name: Chase Sapphire Preferred
items.meta: $5,000 spend in 3 months · matches all-time high
items.why: Best travel-points starter, and it's at the top of its offer range right now.

items.name: Chase IHG Rewards Premier
items.why: Elevated bonus plus a free anniversary night that covers the fee. Rare to see it this high.

items.name: Targeted: 25,000 AA miles
items.meta: Citi AAdvantage Business holders · code JOINA7
items.why: If you're targeted, it's basically free miles for opening an AAdvantage Business Corporate account.

items.name: Amex Platinum — increased entertainment credit
items.meta: Disney+, Hulu, Peacock, YouTube Premium & more
items.why: If you already hold the Plat, this is a straight increase to a credit you're probably already using.
